# `discoverPackageJson`

Generated reference page for the `discoverPackageJson` function export.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/config/package-json.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/config/package-json.ts:109`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/config/package-json.ts#L109)

## Signatures

```ts
function discoverPackageJson(
  adapter: PackageJsonAdapter,
): Promise<PackageJsonData | 'null'>;
```

## Examples

```ts
import { discoverPackageJson } from '@kjanat/dreamcli';

const pkg = await discoverPackageJson(adapter);
if (pkg !== null) {
  console.log(pkg.version); // '1.2.3'
}
```
